title: Oil rises with Brent climbing back above $100 as optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
summary_full: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.
summary_public: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
